education.title: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science & Design
education.institution: G H Patel College Of Engineering & Technology
education.description: Pursuing BTech in Computer Science & Design with a GPA of 9.52/10, focusing on software engineering, distributed systems, and backend architecture.

experience.title: Backend Developer Intern
experience.summary: Engineering event-driven transaction processing systems, Razorpay subscription integrations, and scalable notification services.
experience.description:
Engineering event-driven transaction processing systems, Razorpay subscription integrations, and scalable notification services.

### Key Responsibilities
- Engineered and deployed end-to-end Razorpay Subscription integration, automating recurring billing, webhook processing, and reconciliation
- Built an event-driven transaction processing pipeline using Kafka and RabbitMQ for real-time SMS transaction ingestion
- Designed and implemented a scalable notification system using Firebase Cloud Messaging

### Technologies
Python, Flask, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ, Kafka, Sentry

experience.title: Founding Backend Developer
experience.summary: Architected a multi-tenant backend platform with schema-per-tenant isolation, RBAC, and CI/CD automation.
experience.description:
Architected a multi-tenant backend platform with schema-per-tenant isolation, RBAC, and CI/CD automation.

### Key Responsibilities
- Architected a schema-per-tenant multi-tenant backend using FastAPI and PostgreSQL ensuring tenant isolation
- Implemented JWT-based RBAC supporting tenant-aware authorization across organizations
- Built a configuration-driven document management platform on Amazon S3 with RBAC, MIME validation, and archival workflows
- Automated CI/CD pipelines using Docker, GitHub Actions, and AWS ECR reducing deployment time by 90%
- Developed a multi-agent AI system for task automation, business analytics, and recommendation generation

### Technologies
Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, DynamoDB, LangChain, LangGraph, PyTest, Docker, AWS
